author: 2ZD1
content:
Orchestrator decision: NOT merging the IS4n-Jeg6 attempt; keeping main's existing implementation (cf65a35 + fce0f34) as canonical for #5.

Reason: main already has a working spec-compliant protocol crate (15 tests pass, layout matches .design/overview.md exactly: workspace members crossbridge/ + crossbridge-protocol/ at root, no crates/ prefix). The IS4n-Jeg6 attempt put the crates under crates/, which actually diverges from the spec layout — my earlier salvage handoff comment misread the spec and led the new agent astray. Apologies.

The IS4n-Jeg6 work (be90617 + 6e0442a, 19 tests) is preserved as a branch reference (feature/IS4n-Jeg6-...) for comparison if anyone wants to evaluate it. The .salvage-IS4n-s15o-protocol.patch at repo root is also preserved.

Status: #5's underlying work is in main. Proceeding to kickoff #6, #7, #8 from main as the original orchestration note (2026-05-06 17:36 comment) directed.
